2026-03-25TBPublic Service Superannuation ActReappointment of a member of the Public Service Pension Advisory CommitteeReappointment of Roger Ermuth of Ottawa, Ontario, as a member of the Public Service Pension Advisory Committee, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a member of the Public Service Pension Advisory Committee
precis: Reappointment of Roger Ermuth of Ottawa, Ontario, as a member of the Public Service Pension Advisory Committee, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year.
